dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6677 IH: Professional Degree Access Restoration Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Torres of New York introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Education and Workforce

form.official-title: To amend the Higher Education Act of 1965 to reverse the reductions in Federal loan availability for graduate and professional students enacted under Public Law 119–21.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Professional Degree Access Restoration Act.

section.header: Annual and aggregate loan limits for graduate and professional students
section.text: Section 455(a) of the Higher Education Act of 1965 (20 U.S.C. 1087e(a)) is amended—

subparagraph.text: in the paragraph heading, by striking and federal direct plus loans;

clause.text: by striking the heading for subparagraph (A), and inserting the following: In general;
in the matter preceding clause (i), by inserting before the dash at the end the following: , for any period of instruction beginning on or after July 1, 2012;
in clause (i), by striking for any period of instruction beginning on or after July 1, 2012,; and
in clause (ii), by striking for any period of instruction beginning on July 1, 2012, and ending on June 30, 2026,; and

paragraph.text: by striking paragraph (4), and redesignating paragraphs (5) through (8) as paragraphs (4) through (7), respectively; and
in paragraph (7)(A), as so redesignated, by striking (3)(C) and (4),.
